rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7; total_hits>=1 -> FAIL

results.reason: Source-domain optical biology (glasswing nanostructures, gradient refractive index) — only one content word substring matches; not an LLM artefact.
Gated attention modulates info flow within attention layers; topically adjacent LLM work but no tapered-amplitude pre-projection scaffold and no content-word overlap.
Signal Embedding Energy quantifies activation noise descriptively; does not prescribe a K-stage tapered-norm input scaffold.
Analyzes gradient-descent-trained embedding geometry for softmax attention; analytical not prescriptive of tapered amplitude profile.
DATransNet uses gradient image features inside attention for vision targets; different artefact than input-embedding boundary suppression.
Attention residual augmentation across layers; additive residual differs from tapered random-amplitude pre-attention projection stack.
Greta-oto biomimetic anti-reflective nano-pillar surface; source-domain optical, single content-word match (glasswing nano-pillar) but no LLM mechanism.
Biomimetic LLM memory framework (surprisal-gated encoding, sleep consolidation); different LLM artefact (memory) than input-embedding boundary scaffold.
